svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="xC833hMFej5xNY86z3WV" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-335" dy="-142" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="620" pageHeight="540" background="#ffffff" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=16;align=center;fontStyle=1;" value="图：残差块 —— 主路 F(x) 之外多一条恒等跳连" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="580" x="20" y="12" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mainlbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;horizontal=0;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontColor=#1e6b1e;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="主路 F(x)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="226" width="26" x="118" y="104" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="x" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="输入 x" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="170" x="180" y="56" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="conv1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;" value="Conv 3×3 (bias=False)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="170" x="180" y="104" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bn1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e7f2e4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;" value="BatchNorm" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="170" x="180" y="152" y="248" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bn2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e7f2e4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;" value="BatchNorm" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;" value="+" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="36" x="247" y="348" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="输出 y" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="170" x="180" y="448" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="x" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=1.6;" target="conv1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> parent="1" source="bn2" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=1.6;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="add"> <mxGeometry style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#d79b00;strokeWidth=1.6;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="relu2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="relu2" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#d79b00;strokeWidth=1.6;" target="out"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="skip" edge="1" parent="1" source="x" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;fontColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="add" value="跳连 identity（恒等映射）"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="392" y="73" /> <mxPoint x="392" y="366" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ann" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fbe7e6;strokeColor=#b85450;fontColor=#222222;fontSize=12;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;spacingLeft=10;spacingRight=10;" value="前向：y = ReLU( F(x) + x )

反向：梯度可经跳连「高速公路」直达浅层，
缓解深层网络的梯度消失与退化，
于是能安全堆叠多个残差块。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="190" x="412" y="356" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
前向：y = ReLU( F(x) + x )
反向：梯度可经跳连「高速公路」直达浅层，
缓解深层网络的梯度消失与退化，
于是能安全堆叠多个残差块。
